name: ci-cd-and-automation
tagline: Sets up CI/CD quality-gate pipelines, GitHub Actions configs, deployment strategies, feature flags, and rollback automation.
verdict: Concrete, actionable reference with real YAML configs, a clear CI-failure-to-agent feedback loop, and consistent secrets-in-CI guidance. No security or scope issues found. Weaknesses: no 'NOT for' scoping despite covering the full CI/CD domain, several full YAML templates inlined with no references/ split, and no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for'/exclusion language anywhere in the file despite covering the entire CI/CD and deployment-automation domain.
Multiple full YAML templates (basic CI, integration tests, E2E, rollback workflow, dependabot, caching/parallelism example) inlined with no references/ split.
No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
